_setup: NOTICE: Continue.dev v2.0.0 (June 19 2026) is the FINAL release.
The Continue repo is now read-only — no further updates from the original team.
The bring-your-own-LLM / local-Ollama path still works but is frozen.
Consider migrating to Cursor (which acquired Continue) or Aider.
Legacy Continue config for older installs that still use config.json
Prefer client-configs/continue_config.yaml on current Continue versions
Replace YOUR_TUNNEL_URL with the output of get_tunnel_url.ps1 on your home PC
Replace YOUR_API_KEY with one of the keys from your .env file

models.title: Qwen3-Coder 30B (Recommended)
models.systemMessage: Answer directly. Do not reveal reasoning. For code tasks, inspect the provided context before answering.

models.title: DeepSeek-R1 32B (Optional reasoning profile)
models.systemMessage: Answer directly. Do not reveal reasoning.
